title: APM: Octo Demo Java Payment Error Detection Rule
description: Scheduled-rule-safe count of Java APM sidecar payment errors for Octo checkout traces.
query: 'Log Source' = 'SOC Application Logs' and 'Service Namespace' = 'octo' and 'Java APM Error Type' != null | stats count as JavaPaymentErrorEvents by 'Java APM Error Type', 'Trace ID', 'Response Code'
